title: Cute Wooden Totem
description: This TexturePack Replace Your Totem With A Cute Wooden One
body:
**This Texturepack Adds A Cute Wooden Totem To Your Game.**

This Is A Redesign Of A Totem From Minecraft Dungeons, To Fit The 16x16 Ratio of Minecraft

Hope You Like This And If You Do **Pls Follow** The Project
